---
title: "Examples"
---

Live examples, fetched from real standard.site records at the time this site was rendered.

## A single document, in full

Renders the title, cover, byline, tags, and the document's `textContent` body, with a canonical link to the original post.

````markdown
{{{< standard-document uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.document/3mp6kwt3p6lk5" >}}}
````

{{< standard-document uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.document/3mp6kwt3p6lk5" >}}

## Compact card

Set `mode="card"` for a compact reference card — useful when the document is a citation rather than the body you want to reproduce.

````markdown
{{{< standard-document uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.document/3mp6kwt3p6lk5" mode="card" >}}}
````

{{< standard-document uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.document/3mp6kwt3p6lk5" mode="card" >}}

## A publication feed

Lists a publication's documents as cards, newest first.

````markdown
{{{< standard-publication uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.publication/3mp6kwt3kmggd" limit="4" >}}}
````

{{< standard-publication uri="at://did:plc:qqcz624yyb7ruo4fxay5k7py/site.standard.publication/3mp6kwt3kmggd" limit="4" >}}
